Jiangsu Jiangyin-Jingjiang Industrial Park Sanhe Machinery Technology Co., Ltd. is a small-scale machining and auto parts processing workshop, deeply embedded in the Yangtze River manufacturing belt. Located in the specialized Jiangyin-Jingjiang cross-river industrial zone, it operates as a Tier-2 or Tier-3 supplier, focusing on the basic processing, machining, and manufacturing of general mechanical parts and specific automotive components for larger OEMs in the region.
